blockers.summary: Workflow files cannot be published until the maintainer uses credentials with GitHub workflow scope.
requiredEvidence: Credential or GitHub App permission includes workflow scope.
Workflow file is pushed to the target repository.
Hosted workflow run executes the commands documented in docs/ci-workflow-spec.md.
currentEvidence: docs/ci-workflow-spec.md documents the intended hosted CI workflow.
docs/release-readiness.md lists workflow publication as a deferred release item.
npm run validate:release:full remains the local equivalent until hosted workflow publication is possible.
resolution: Use a maintainer credential with workflow scope.
Record the first successful hosted workflow run in release evidence.
blockers.reviewRule: Do not claim hosted CI coverage until the workflow file is present in GitHub and a run is visible for the reviewed commit.

blockers.summary: Runtime, hardware, wallet, and production-capacity claims require targeted manual evidence before a production release.
requiredEvidence: Manual release gate template is completed for each claimed runtime surface.
Artifacts are tied to the exact commit and environment.
Secrets, server addresses, wallet keys, and raw production logs remain out of public repositories.
currentEvidence: docs/manual-release-gates.md lists triggers, minimum evidence, pass criteria, and owners.
npm run audit:manual-gates checks consistency across reviewer-facing documents and generated evidence.
npm run audit:maturity includes the same manual gaps in machine-readable output.
resolution: Collect gate-specific evidence when making the corresponding release claim.
Attach redacted artifacts to private release evidence or a public-safe summary.
Rerun release evidence and review package audits.
blockers.reviewRule: Accept repository review readiness separately from production launch readiness; reject any release claim that names a manual gate without evidence.
